{"query":"Megalopolis Unbound streaming platforms release date January 2026 availability","model":"mako","response_time_ms":2063,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://decider.com/2024/11/11/watch-megalopolis-movie-streaming-megalopolis-digital-release-date/","title":"‘Megalopolis’ Comes to Digital, But When Will ‘Megalopolis’ Be Streaming? | Decider","content":"Written, directed, and paid for by Coppola—who has been trying to get this film made for over thirty years—Megalopolis is set in an alternate reality of modern-day New York City, which is dubbed “New Rome.” Adam Driver stars as Cesar Catilina, a once-great elite leader whose fallen into alcoholism and depression.
The Megalopolis movie will be released on digital, on premium video-on-demand, on Tuesday, November 12.
The film will cost $24.99 to buy a digital copy, or $19.99 to rent.
There is not yet a Megalopolis movie streaming release date."},{"url":"https://bingebase.com/releases/digital","title":"Digital Release Dates for New Movies: July 2026 | Bingebase","content":"Track digital release dates for every new movie coming to streaming platforms this month.
July Highlights: Backrooms (Jul 14), Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle (Jul 28), Disclosure Day (Jul 21) lead this month's movie debuts, with 67 total new movies coming to digital platforms.
Movies often appear on purchase platforms (Apple TV, Amazon) before rental options, and exclusive streaming deals may limit availability to specific services."},{"url":"https://www.ign.com/articles/how-to-watch-megalopolis","title":"How to Watch Megalopolis – Where to Stream Online in 2025","content":"The Godfather director Francis Ford Coppola returned in 2024 with his first movie in 13 years: Megalopolis, a "Roman Epic set in an imagined Modern America." IGN's Megalopolis review awarded it a score of 9/10, calling Coppola's new movie "a frustrating madcap odyssey that gives way to something wildly unique." That said, takes on this movie are all over the place, with its most recent (and only) accolade being Coppola's 'win' for "Worst Director" at the 2025 Razzies.
Megalopolis became available to rent from digital platforms, including Prime Video, less than a month after it released in theaters.
Earlier in 2025, the movie was pulled from most of the marketplaces alongside listings for the 4K physical release."},{"url":"https://screenrant.com/megalopolis-movie-re-release-date-confirmed-francis-ford-coppola/","title":"Francis Ford Coppola's $14M Sci-Fi Epic Flop Gets Surprise Theatrical Re-Release To Engage "Fulcrum Of Discussion"","content":"Almost everyone skipped Francis Ford Coppola’s Megalopolis when it released in 2024, but the legendary filmmaker is giving moviegoers a second chance to witness his sci-fi vision on the big screen.
In somewhat of a surprise announcement, the director said on social media that Megalopolis will be re-released on New Year’s Day 2026 in select Alamo Drafthouse locations.
The legendary director reportedly spent $120 million of his own money to make Megalopolis, and saw it gross just $14 million at the box office.
“This is exactly what happened with Apocalypse Now 40 years ago.
There were very contradicting views expressed, but the audience never stopped going to see the film, and to this day Apocalypse Now is still in very profitable distribution.
Megalopolis, directed by Francis Ford Coppola, is a visionary 2024 film exploring the ambitious dream of reconstructing New York City into a utopia, following a devastating disaster."}]}
